purpose.zh: 把分行业导出的企业 Excel 名单，转成可追踪、可人工复核、可导出的货运线索处理批次。
purpose.en: Turn industry-specific company spreadsheets into traceable, human-reviewed freight lead batches with exportable results.

originalWorkflow.zh: 运营人员分别整理企业名单、检查网站、寻找公开联系方式，再手工判断线索质量。
originalWorkflow.en: Operators separately cleaned company lists, checked websites, found public contacts, and judged lead quality by hand.

originalWorkflow.zh: 无效行、缺失网站和处理进度分散在不同文件与人工记录中。
originalWorkflow.en: Invalid rows, missing websites, and processing progress were scattered across files and manual notes.

workflowBreakpoints.zh: Excel 输入质量不一致，错误行容易被静默遗漏。
workflowBreakpoints.en: Inconsistent spreadsheet quality made invalid rows easy to lose silently.

workflowBreakpoints.zh: 公开企业信息、判断依据和外联草稿缺少统一的审核界面。
workflowBreakpoints.en: Public company evidence, scoring rationale, and outreach drafts lacked one review surface.

workflowBreakpoints.zh: 批次失败后难以判断从哪里继续，导出结果也难以复查。
workflowBreakpoints.en: After failures it was difficult to know where to resume or how to audit exported results.

systemBoundary.zh: 系统在客户控制的 Docker 环境中处理业务 Excel 与公开企业信息；它只生成外联草稿，不自动批量发送，最终使用由人工审核决定。
systemBoundary.en: The system processes business spreadsheets and public company information in a customer-controlled Docker environment. It generates outreach drafts only; it does not auto-send campaigns, and a human decides final use.

inputs.zh: 按行业或客户名单导出的 Excel 文件
inputs.en: Excel exports grouped by industry or customer list

inputs.zh: 企业名称、地址、网站等业务字段
inputs.en: Business fields such as company name, address, and website

inputs.zh: 无需登录即可访问的企业公开网页
inputs.en: Public company pages that do not require login

processing.zh: 按文件哈希去重并建立可暂停、恢复和重试的处理批次
processing.en: Deduplicate files by hash and create pausable, resumable, retryable batches

processing.zh: 清洗行数据，保留无效原因，提取公开企业联系方式
processing.en: Clean rows, preserve invalid reasons, and extract public business contacts

processing.zh: 生成线索判断依据与英文外联草稿，写入可审计状态
processing.en: Generate lead rationale and English outreach drafts with auditable states

humanReview.zh: 逐条查看原始字段、公开证据、评分原因与草稿内容
humanReview.en: Review raw fields, public evidence, scoring rationale, and draft content per company

humanReview.zh: 人工决定是否修改、使用或停止联系；系统不替代合规判断
humanReview.en: A human decides whether to edit, use, or stop contact; the system does not replace compliance judgment

outputs.zh: 包含批次进度、异常原因和企业证据的运营工作台
outputs.en: An operations workbench with batch progress, exception reasons, and company evidence

outputs.zh: 企业结果表与多条公开联系方式补充表
outputs.en: A company result sheet plus a supplemental table of public contacts

outputs.zh: 可复制、待人工审核的外联邮件主题与正文草稿
outputs.en: Copyable outreach subject and body drafts pending human review

failureRecovery.zh: 无效记录不会被删除，而是保留明确原因供复核。
failureRecovery.en: Invalid records are preserved with explicit reasons instead of being deleted.

failureRecovery.zh: 批次支持暂停、恢复、重试、事件日志和重复文件保护。
failureRecovery.en: Batches support pause, resume, retry, event logs, and duplicate-file protection.

currentStatus.zh: 已用于真实付费客户交付。公开验收批次处理 601 行：521 行有效、80 行无效、0 行处理失败；公开信息回填后形成 469 条联系方式记录，覆盖 126 家企业。
currentStatus.en: Delivered for a real paying client. The disclosed acceptance batch processed 601 rows: 521 valid, 80 invalid, and 0 processing failures. Public-information backfill produced 469 contact records across 126 companies.

transferableCapabilities.zh: 把不稳定的业务表格转成可恢复的处理队列
transferableCapabilities.en: Turn inconsistent business spreadsheets into a recoverable processing queue

transferableCapabilities.zh: 把自动判断与关键人工审核放在同一条流程中
transferableCapabilities.en: Combine automated judgment and critical human review in one workflow

transferableCapabilities.zh: 用状态、事件和结构化导出保留完整追踪链
transferableCapabilities.en: Preserve traceability through states, events, and structured exports

transferableCapabilities.zh: 以镜像化部署交付客户可独立运行的系统
transferableCapabilities.en: Deliver a customer-operated system through image-based deployment

description.zh: 展示从批次输入、公开信息处理、人工审核到结构化导出的系统边界。
description.en: Shows the system boundary from batch input and public-information processing to human review and structured export.

label.zh: 真实 Docker 验收记录

description.zh: 服务、API、前端、导出和移动端均使用真实批次完成验收；公开站仅披露经批准的汇总数字。
description.en: Services, API, frontend, exports, and mobile behavior were accepted with a real batch; the public site discloses approved aggregate figures only.

limitations.zh: 只处理公开企业信息，不抓取登录后页面或个人资料。
limitations.en: Processes public business information only; it does not crawl authenticated pages or personal profiles.

limitations.zh: 外联内容必须人工审核，系统不提供无差别批量自动发送。
limitations.en: Outreach content requires human review; the system does not provide indiscriminate automated bulk sending.

limitations.zh: 公开数字来自一个已验收批次，不代表所有客户或行业都会得到相同结果。
limitations.en: Published figures come from one accepted batch and do not imply identical results for every client or industry.

alt.zh: Freight Lead Agent 批次处理与人工审核界面
alt.en: Freight Lead Agent batch processing and human-review interface
